raw_consumer_statement:
XXXX XXXX Fraudulent charges to my Home Depot Credit Card account XXXX disputed charges with HD Rep by phone. rep stated it was obvious these were fraudulent charges appearing to be an inside job. 
XX/XX/XXXX HD credited fraudulent charges to my account Later HD denied charges as fraud charges stating a chip card was used. 
we have two cards and were in our possession and no unauthorized use was made by the two card holders XXXX XXXX I reopened claim and no response My attorney filed a demand letter XX/XX/XXXX with no response. later contacting HD by phone and was told they would look into the claim. still no response XX/XX/XXXX Attorney filed another demand letter with an appeal to open the claim. 
no response to date. 
Total amount of Fraudulent charges {$6600.00} plus accumulated interest {$3200.00} totals {$9800.00}.
